blocks.text: Good to have the leadership bios and the background pack. They give us enough to start shaping the core messages from your own material rather than from what is already out there, which is the better place to begin.

Kimberly Le is reading back through the last year of coverage so we know exactly how the company is being described today before we try to move it. Melissa Zimmerman is holding a provisional window for the announcement and will keep it clear until we have a firm date from you.

Two asks before the first draft goes out. Can you confirm who will be the named spokesperson so we can tailor the quotes to their voice, and let me know whether the week we discussed still works on your side? Once both are settled I will send the key messages over for the {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}} team to react to.
